title: Biomify
description: This project adds many new biomes and structures to the base game :) (More to come)
body:
# Biomify!

**Hello, and welcome to Biomify!**

Biomify is a project created by me! (MrTails/Reynard),
At the moment it only adds one more biome, but I slowly want to continue adding on more and more.

It is a very light worldgen changer and is great if you need a change of minecraft plains :)

License: All Rights Reserved

I plan to add many new biomes with many structures. I just wanted to get the project out there as quickly as possible :)
